zoom.label: Wallpaper Zoom
zoom.desc: Scale of the wallpaper to provide room for parallax movement

direction.label: Parallax Direction
direction.desc: Which direction the wallpaper shifts when changing workspaces

invert.label: Invert Direction
invert.desc: Move the wallpaper in the same direction as workspace changes

autoZoom.label: Auto Zoom
autoZoom.desc: Automatically and progressively zoom to prevent background layer from showing

easing.label: Easing Curve
easing.desc: The mathematical curve used for parallax animations
